requirement: Build fix-gateway Go service with FIX 4.4 parser, session management, broker registry

tasks.title: FIX gateway service — scaffold + message parser + session + brokers + docker + gateway
tasks.description:
Build the complete fix-gateway Go service in one task.

Read docs/fix-gateway-spec.md for the full specification.

Create src/fix-gateway/ with this structure:

Part A — Scaffold:
- go.mod (github.com/garudax-platform/fix-gateway, go 1.25.0, zero deps)
- cmd/fix-gateway/main.go — HTTP admin on 8091, health on 9091
- Dockerfile — multi-stage Go 1.25 build, EXPOSE 8091 9091 9878
- internal/types/types.go — FIXSession, FIXBroker, FIXMessage types

Part B — FIX message parser (internal/fix/parser.go):
- Parse FIX 4.4 tag=value|SOH format: split by SOH (0x01), parse tag=value pairs
- FIXMessage struct: map[int]string (tag→value), raw bytes
- ParseMessage([]byte) (*FIXMessage, error)
- BuildMessage(msgType string, fields map[int]string) []byte
- Key tags: 8=BeginString, 9=BodyLength, 35=MsgType, 49=SenderCompID, 56=TargetCompID, 34=MsgSeqNum, 10=CheckSum
- Message types: A(Logon), 5(Logout), 0(Heartbeat), 1(TestRequest), D(NewOrderSingle), 8(ExecutionReport), F(OrderCancelRequest), 9(OrderCancelReject)
- Checksum calculation: sum of all bytes mod 256, formatted as 3-digit string

Part C — FIX field mapping (internal/fix/mapper.go):
- FIXToSecurityOrder(msg *FIXMessage) (*SecurityOrder, error) — map FIX NewOrderSingle fields:
  Tag 55(Symbol)→InstrumentID, Tag 54(Side: 1=BUY,2=SELL,5=SHORT_SELL), Tag 40(OrdType: 1=MARKET,2=LIMIT), Tag 38(OrderQty)→Quantity, Tag 44(Price), Tag 59(TimeInForce: 0=DAY,1=GTC,3=IOC,4=FOK), Tag 11(ClOrdID)
- SecurityOrderToExecutionReport(order, trade) *FIXMessage — map to ExecutionReport:
  Tag 37(OrderID), Tag 17(ExecID), Tag 150(ExecType), Tag 39(OrdStatus), Tag 151(LeavesQty), Tag 14(CumQty), Tag 6(AvgPx)

Part D — Session management (internal/session/manager.go):
- SessionState: DISCONNECTED, LOGON_SENT, ACTIVE, LOGOUT_SENT
- Session struct: SenderCompID, TargetCompID, TenantID, State, InSeqNum uint64, OutSeqNum uint64, HeartbeatInterval int, LastRecvTime
- SessionManager struct: sessions map[string]*Session (key: SenderCompID:TargetCompID)
- CreateSession, GetSession, ProcessLogon(msg) (*Session, error), ProcessLogout, IncrementSeq, ValidateSeqNum
- Logon validation: check CompID exists in broker registry, check password

Part E — Broker management (internal/broker/store.go + handlers):
- FIXBroker struct: ID, CompID, TenantID, Name, Status (ACTIVE/SUSPENDED), Config (HeartbeatInterval, MaxMsgSize, EncryptionRequired), CreatedAt
- BrokerStore interface: Create, Get, GetByCompID, List, UpdateStatus + InMemory
- HTTP handlers (internal/server/):
  POST /api/v1/fix/brokers — create
  GET /api/v1/fix/brokers — list
  GET /api/v1/fix/brokers/{id} — get
  PUT /api/v1/fix/brokers/{id}/status — activate/suspend
  GET /api/v1/fix/sessions — list active sessions

Part F — Wire:
- docker-compose.yml: add fix-gateway service (8091:8091, 9091:9091, 9878:9878)
- gateway proxy routes: /api/v1/fix/* → fix-gateway:8091

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/fix-gateway && go build ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for FIX parser, session, brokers
tasks.description:
Write comprehensive tests for the fix-gateway.

Tests:

1. internal/fix/parser_test.go:
- TestParseMessage_Valid — parse a well-formed FIX message, verify all tags
- TestParseMessage_Logon — parse Logon(A) with CompID+password
- TestParseMessage_NewOrderSingle — parse order with all fields
- TestParseMessage_InvalidFormat → error
- TestParseMessage_BadChecksum → error
- TestBuildMessage — build and verify checksum, BeginString, BodyLength
- TestBuildMessage_RoundTrip — build then parse, verify identical

2. internal/fix/mapper_test.go:
- TestFIXToSecurityOrder — map NewOrderSingle → SecurityOrder, verify all fields
- TestFIXToSecurityOrder_MarketOrder — no price tag
- TestFIXToSecurityOrder_InvalidSide → error
- TestSecurityOrderToExecutionReport — verify all FIX tags in response

3. internal/session/manager_test.go:
- TestSession_Logon — create session from valid logon → ACTIVE
- TestSession_InvalidCompID → error
- TestSession_SequenceNumber — verify increment and validation
- TestSession_Logout — ACTIVE → DISCONNECTED
- TestSession_HeartbeatTimeout — detect missing heartbeat

4. internal/broker/store_test.go:
- TestBrokerStore_CRUD
- TestBrokerStore_GetByCompID
- TestBrokerStore_UpdateStatus

Target: 80%+ on parser, 70%+ on session.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/fix-gateway && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md
